title: VanillaVibes+
description: A Vanilla+ experience blending quality-of-life enhancements, immersive features, and vanilla-style additions for a perfect balance of simplicity and sophistication
body:
**Embark on a redefined Minecraft adventure with VanillaVibes+, meticulously crafted to elevate every aspect of your gameplay. Immerse yourself in a Vanilla+ experience that seamlessly integrates quality-of-life enhancements, immersive features, and a diverse array of decorative, culinary, and vanilla-style technology additions.**

Delight in the aesthetic beauty brought by carefully chosen decorative elements, allowing you to personalize your world with style. Dive into the culinary delights of the game, with new recipes and food options that add a flavorful touch to your survival journey. Embrace the subtle technologies introduced, providing enhanced convenience without straying from the classic Minecraft feel.

Discover a world where quality meets playability, where each addition is thoughtfully curated to enhance your enjoyment without overwhelming the core experience. VanillaVibes+ invites you to explore the perfect balance between tradition and innovation, ensuring that every improvement feels like a natural extension of the beloved Minecraft universe.

## Additions

### Culinary

**Indulge in a culinary adventure like never before with our modpack's extensive additions to the world of food and beverages.**

- Unleash your inner vintner with a new crafting system for wine, offering multiple variants that affect you differently.
- Satisfy your sweet cravings with new food items like bread, cupcakes, cakes, and tarts.
- Experiment with new crafting stations—glazing, baking, and caking—and enjoy new effects that enhance your gameplay.
- Cook with potions to infuse your meals with special effects.
- Embrace the culinary delights of cheese with a dedicated crafting system and explore a fully overhauled meadow biome with new animal breeds, wool, carpets, and beds.
- Venture to the beach biome with palm trees, sea stars, and sand waves.
- Craft with palm wood and decorate with beach-themed blocks like deck chairs, lounge chairs, and tiki bars.
- Savor the summer vibes with ice cream, popsicles, and cocktails, and encounter new beach-dwelling creatures like pelicans.
- Experience the charm of tea time with Herbal Brews, introducing lavender tea, black tea, green tea, coffee, and potions.
- Unwind with a variety of vials offering long-lasting strengthening effects.

### Decorative

**Transform your Minecraft world into a haven of style and functionality with our modpack's extensive decorative features.**

- Enhance your architectural aesthetics with shutters for windows, terracotta amphoras, book piles that power enchanting tables, and cozy woolen sofas.
- Create vibrant outdoor spaces with hanging pots, book stacks, blinds, picture frames, and climbing ropes.
- Illuminate your surroundings with bamboo lanterns, candelabras, glow essence jars, and light bulbs.
- Introduce clutter to your world with lattices for plants on walls and ceilings, offering a 'vanilla-ish' feel.
- Explore fun gameplay mechanics like new potion effects, such as Vulnerability, and variations of the Elytra, like Butterfly Elytras.
- Unlock a treasure trove of over 1,000 pieces of functional and visually appealing furniture, crafted with attention to detail.
- Enjoy compatibility with other mods like Sandwichable, REI, JEI, EMI, Patchouli, and Farmer's Delight.

### Immersive

**Immerse yourself in the rich tapestry of Minecraft with our modpack's meticulously crafted immersion features.**

- Rediscover the game with enhanced third-person animations, adding a layer of realism to the way your character interacts with the world.
- Experience a more atmospheric Minecraft with improved in-game models, allowing for better animations and subtle effects that simulate physics and bring the game to life.
- Engage your senses with immersive audio enhancements, including water pop sounds for droplets landing, sizzle sounds for lava drops, and biome-specific environment sounds that evolve with the time of day.
- Delve into the depths of the earth with cave sounds intensifying as you mine deeper, only to fade away as you illuminate the area.
- Traverse villages accompanied by general activity sounds during the day, creating a dynamic and lively atmosphere.
- Experience the world like never before with realistic sound attenuation, reverberation, and absorption through blocks.
- Watch as your surroundings come alive with new particles, from crystal sparkles and custom blob particles for slimes to environmental particles that add depth to your Minecraft adventure.
- Feel the realism beneath your feet as you walk on different surfaces, each block contributing to the immersive soundscape.

## More

This modpack also adds several features to make Minecraft more friendly. Specially graves to make death less devastating in some situations. It also includes Iris along with the Complementary shaders and several performance mods which should allow this modpack to run with a wide variety of graphics settings while still working on most machines.
